description_long: This is a modern, single-basin kitchen or utility sink with a deep rectangular bowl and an integrated draining board to the left. The sink features a tall, angular faucet with a single lever handle, positioned above the basin for easy access. The draining board has subtle grooves to channel water back into the basin, and the overall design is sleek with clean, straight edges. The surface appears to be made of a dark, matte composite material, likely granite or quartz composite, giving it a contemporary look. The drain is centrally located within the basin, and there is no visible overflow hole. The sink is designed for drop-in installation, with a prominent rim around the perimeter.
description: A modern, dark-colored single-basin sink with an integrated draining board and a tall, angular faucet. The design is sleek and contemporary, with a matte finish and clean lines.
description_view_0: Side view showing the deep basin, integrated draining board, and the faucet positioned above the basin.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rectangular basin, faucet, and the draining board to the left.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the depth of the basin and the faucet's placement.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the full layout of the basin, draining board, and faucet arrangement.
